headline: Expedia Group (EXPE) Signs Allegiant Deal, Is The Stock Still 23% Undervalued?
summary: Expedia Group (EXPE) has moved into focus after signing a 12-month exclusive agreement to distribute Allegiant Travel Company flights. The deal covers 566 routes across 124 U.S. cities through its U.S. brands. See our latest analysis for Expedia Group. The Allegiant agreement arrives after a solid run for Expedia Group, with a 30 day share price return of 9.98% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 40.96%. This suggests momentum has picked up recently despite a weaker year to date share...
